def eligible_for_scholarship(self) -> bool:
        """This function takes a student object and returns a boolean value.
Write the condition by defining the necessary attribute/attributes to select the student
who is eligible to receive a scholarship.
        """
        return (28 <= self.age <= 61) and \
               (3.5 <= self.GPA <= 3.7) and \
               (self.enrollment_status in ['full_time', 'part_time']) and \
               self.gender.lower() in ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral'] and \
               self.race.lower() in ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and \
               self.employment_status.lower() in ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student'] and \
               self.education.lower() in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and \
               self.marital_status.lower() in ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated'] and \
               self.religion.lower() in ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
